title: Savory Silky Mexican Penne Pasta Individual Mini Tamales
description: A halal-friendly, one-pot Mexican dish featuring penne pasta, pickle, and a silky sauce, served in individual mini tamales. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add cumin and chili powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add diced tomatoes, salt, and black pepper. Bring to a simmer.
Stir in penne pasta and pickle. Cook until pasta is al dente, about 10-12 minutes.
Add shredded Monterey Jack cheese and stir until melted.
Lay a corn husk flat on a work surface. Spread about 1/2 cup of the pasta mixture onto the center of the husk, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the sides of the corn husk over the filling, then roll the tamale up, folding the top over to seal.
Repeat with the remaining filling and corn husks. Steam the tamales for 20-25 minutes, or until the dough is tender and the cheese is melted.
Serve the tamales warm, garnished with chopped cilantro.
